name: Tuna Provencal (or Open Faced Sandwiches
recipeInstructions:
1. In a large bowl, mix the tuna, capers, olives, onion, and tomatoes.
2. Pour in the olive oil and red wine vinegar; toss until well combined.
3. Season with salt and pepper to taste.
4. Serve on whole grain bread with watercress.
Salad Variation:
1. Arrange mixed greens on a plate.
2. Top with quartered boiled new potato, quartered hard cooked egg, and green beans.
3. Place a scoop of tuna salad in the center of the plate.
